titleStmt.title: SII 9.491: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 491. (A.R. No. 500 of 1907.) ON A SLAB DISCOVERED IN THE UNDER-GROUND TEMPLE OF PRASANNA-VIRUPAKSHA AT HAMPI, HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1435, Śrīmukha, Chaitra, śu. 5, corresponding to A.D. 1513 March 12 Saturday (not verifiable), in the reign of Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya. It records that the king made a gift of certain villages (named), together with two gardens, for the service of the god Prasanna-Virūpākshadēva. The gift was made for the merit of his father, Narasaṇṇa-Nāyaka, and mother Nāgāji-Amma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . nama(ḥ)stuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁ
bha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayādbhudayaśālivāhanasakavaruśa 1435 ne
ya śrīmukhasaṁvatsarada cayitra śu 5 lu śrīmma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra
kruṣṇarāyamahārāyaru na(ṁ)mma paṭṭadalu śrīprasaṁnavirūpākṣadēvara Amrutaphaḍi nai
vēdyakū Aṁgaraṁgavayibhōgakū māsapūje māsauchaha nitya naimitaka dīpārādhana paṁcapa
rva modalāda puṁṇyakālagaḷalū māḍuva mahāpūje naivēdyakū samarpisida grāma
kaṁnakiyakaṭeya grāma 1 prākina grāmagaḷu bukāpurada grāma 1 meṭareya ha
ttiraṇa nāgalāpurada grāma 1 Ubhayaṁ prākina grāma 2 tōṭagaḷu Aṁṇājiya
hōbaḷiya tōṭa 1 kaṁ bījavari kha 1 bhūpatiya keṟeyalū hulu sūpu tō
ṭada staḷa 2 sāḷuvagēriyalū saluva tōṭa 1 kaṁbi 2 gaurājiya keṟeya grāma
1 Aṁtu grāma 4 tōṭa 3 mānyagaḷu paḍuvaṇa rāmāpuradalū saluva mānya 1 kaṁ bīja
vari kha 1 Aṁtāpuradalū saluva mānya 1 kaṁ bījavari 1 Ubhayaṁ mānya 2 śivapuradalu
saluva mānya 1 kaṁ bījavari khaṁ . 0 Aṁtu mānya 3 Urattigaḷu EreŪra Agrāhāradalū sa
luva Uratti 1 vōruvāya Agrāhāradalu saluva Uratti 1 Ubhayaṁ Uratti 2 Aṁ
tu grāma 4 tōṭa 3 mānya 3 Uratti 2 nāgalāpurada grāmake saluva kāluvaḷi 4 sahā
sakala suvarnādāya sakala bhatta Ādāya staḷada sunka sāṁya taḷavāṟikeya roka bhata jō
ḍi birāḍa grāmagaḷa nīra birāḍa Anupu hārikāyi modalāda Ēnuṁṭādanu sa
rvamānyavāgi naṁma taṁde narasaṇanāyakavoḍeyarigū naṁma tāyi nāgājiAṁma
navarigū pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgi sūryyagrāhaṇa puṁṇyakāladalū Ācaṁdrārkastāyiyā
gi naḍava mariyādeyalu samarpisideU �yo dharmake Ārobaru tappidare ta(ṁ)mma tāyitaṁ
deya vāraṇāsiyali koṁda pāpadalū kōdavaru gōhatya braṁhatya strīhatya bru
ṇahatya Aśvētigaḷa māḍida pāpakke hōdavaru .
Digital edition of SII 9.491 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
